answer: 相关系数: 0.7155, 相关性类型: 强正相关
what_changed: Created Python script to calculate Pearson correlation coefficient between ChiNext Index (399006) and Shanghai Composite Index (000001) for the period 2026-02-24 to 2026-03-30. Used mootdx library to fetch index data, calculated daily returns, and computed correlation. Generated correlation_report.txt with the required format.
final_method: Used mootdx.Quotes.index() method to retrieve daily closing prices for both indices. Calculated daily returns using pct_change(). Computed Pearson correlation coefficient using numpy.corrcoef(). Applied threshold-based classification: >0.7 for strong positive correlation.

artifacts.description: Correlation analysis report containing coefficient (0.7155) and type classification (强正相关)
Python script implementing the correlation calculation using mootdx
